text.title: idempotent-write-tools Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for idempotent-write-tools as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Generating the idempotency key INSIDE the tool (key = uuid4() at the top of execute).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The key must be the same across retries. If the tool generates it, every retry gets a fresh key and the dedup never fires.

failure-mode.description: Adding idempotency_key to read tools "for consistency".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Bloats the schema, confuses the model, costs tokens — reads are already safe to repeat.

failure-mode.description: *_preview that internally calls the upstream "dry-run" but still mutates a cache or counter.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: If preview has any observable side effect, agents cannot safely run it speculatively, and the safety property collapses.
